notes: V0.6.7 only defines the scoring contract and mock scorer.
No external model API is called in V0.6.7.
V0.6.8 uses DeepSeek only through an explicit opt-in tiny probe.
V0.6.8.1 requires LLM_SCORING_ENABLED=on plus --confirm-live-api before any DeepSeek request.
V0.6.9 adds a separate rule-vs-DeepSeek comparison report under local_outputs/.
V0.7.0 adds a real ScrapeCreators Reddit small-sample rule-vs-DeepSeek comparison report.
V0.7.1 improves real sample quality selection and topic quality summaries.
V0.7.2 adds DeepSeek partial quality-gate labels for suspicious or edge samples.
V0.7.3 adds report-plus-analysis sections to the side comparison report.
V0.7.4 adds a local keyword convergence plan from the real-sample comparison JSON.
V0.7.5 applies the keyword convergence plan to the quality-test active topics.
V0.9.7 allows capped DeepSeek semantic review to appear in the formal report when LLM_SCORING_ENABLED=on and DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is configured.
V0.9.7 DeepSeek review is a two-column quality check, not the final judge; rule scoring still owns the existing high/edge/low buckets.
The probe writes only to local_outputs/llm_scoring_probe.md and related local_outputs files.
The comparison report writes only to local_outputs/llm_scoring_comparison.md and related local_outputs files.
The real sample comparison writes only to local_outputs/llm_scoring_real_sample_comparison.md and related local_outputs files.
Formal report DeepSeek failures write sanitized diagnostics to local_outputs/llm_report_review_error.md and must not block report generation.

result_schema.evidence_type: trend_signal | pain_point | content_idea | tool_idea | noise | background
